meaning: n.[动物]加拿大白鲑(一种青鱼) Cisco系统公司是企业网络产品的全球领先供应商
examples: The great mind behind Songdo is from the company Cisco.
What Cisco will likely announce this spring will be blade servers powered by virtualization.
In 2001, Cisco wrote off inventory worth US $2.25 billion due to duplicate orders.
Cisco did not customize or train the Chinese in how to use the routers.
Networking leader Cisco has cut costs by embedding Linux and the MySQL database into its products.
